title: Breadboard Layout Explorer
description: Students will explain which holes on a breadboard are electrically connected to each other, and correctly trace a circuit path from the power rail through a component to ground.
creator: Dan McCreary STEM Robots
subject: Robotics
Physical Computing
Computational Thinking
MicroPython
bloomLevel: Understand (L2) — Explain how the internal connections of a breadboard allow components to share electrical pathways.

learningObjectives: Students will explain which holes on a breadboard are electrically connected to each other, and correctly trace a circuit path from the power rail through a component to ground.
educational.bloomTaxonomy: Understand (L2) — Explain how the internal connections of a breadboard allow components to share electrical pathways.
educational.prerequisites: Basic familiarity with the robot platform and MicroPython introduced earlier in the course.

pedagogical.interactionPattern: Interactive p5.js exploration with immediate visual feedback
pedagogical.rationale: Manipulating the model and seeing the result immediately helps students build an accurate mental model before working with the physical robot.
pedagogical.assessment: Use the discussion questions in the lesson plan to check for understanding.
